REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, NOTICE OF MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT IS GRANTED. (CCP SECTION 473(B).) DEFENDANT LU IS ORDERED TO PAY $1,000 (THE MAXIMUM PER STATUTE) TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL WITHIN FIVE (5) DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. (CCP SECTION 473(C)(1)(A).) DEFENDANT TO FILE AND SERVE HIS ANSWER FORTHWITH. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES ; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Off Calendar May-14-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default
Off Calendar May-07-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT DAN LU Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default is GRANTED. (CCP section 473(b).) Defendant Lu is ordered to pay $1,000 (the maximum per statute) to Plaintiff's Counsel within five (5) days of Notice of Entry of Order. (CCP section 473(c)(1)(A).) Defendant to file and serve his Answer forthwith.

Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default
Off Calendar Apr-29-2025 Continued To May-07-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT DAN LU'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT is CONTINUED to May 7, 2025 at 9:30 a.m., for opposing party to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the opposition no later than April 30, 2025 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. (Moving papers and reply received.)

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)
